question_text: Goal is weight gain or muscle gain?
High blood pressure or heart disease?
Personal/family history of medullary thyroid cancer or MEN2?
Pregnant, breastfeeding, or trying to conceive?
History of gallstones or RUQ pain?
Unintentional weight loss or B symptoms (fever/night sweats)?
Willing to track protein and calories?
Frequent vomiting or cannot keep fluids down?
Dumping symptoms after carbs (sweats, cramps, diarrhea)?
No follow-up with bariatric team recently?
Unable to meet protein intake daily?
Concern about restrictive eating or purging?
Severe weakness or unable to function?
Cold intolerance or feeling very cold?
Body image distress driving eating behavior?
